### 3. **Legal and Ethical Considerations**

- **Ethical responsibilities** – Highlight the importance of protecting user privacy and data security.

**Email Body:**

Dear Valued Customer,

[Verify Account Details](https://fake-bank-verification.com)

This is a one-time verification request, and failure to complete it may result in the temporary suspension of your account services.

Please note that this verification is not related to any recent transactions or account changes.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,  
Customer Support Team  
[Bank Name]  
[Phone Number] | [Website URL]

---
